news_items.headline: Yankees' Judge out with 'nagging' bone bruise
news_items.summary: Yankees slugger Aaron Judge is day to day with a bone bruise that is causing "nagging" soreness in his right shoulder and will miss Tuesday's game vs. the Guardians.

news_items.headline: Astros closer Hader off IL, ready for '26 debut
news_items.summary: All-Star closer Josh Hader was reinstated from the 60-day injured list by the Astros after sitting out all season, providing a major boost for their bullpen.

news_items.headline: MLBPA sees clear distance from MLB in CBA talks
news_items.summary: Bruce Meyer, interim executive director and lead negotiator for MLBPA, believes -- after viewing what MLB proposed -- there's a clear sign of the distance between the two sides just six months before the current collective bargaining agreement expires.

news_items.headline: Giants hire former Astros third base coach Pettis
news_items.summary: The San Francisco Giants have hired Gary Pettis as their third base coach, less than a week after reassigning Hector Borg to a different role in player development.

news_items.headline: 'Dominant' deGrom, 37, fans 8 in 100th victory
news_items.summary: Texas veteran starter Jacob deGrom, 37, a two-time NL Cy Young Award winner, tossed five scoreless innings to earn his 100th career victory, and Ezequiel Duran had three hits, as the Texas Rangers outlasted the St. Louis Cardinals 2-1 on Monday night.

news_items.headline: Ortiz says owner Henry 'worried' about Red Sox
news_items.summary: Hall of Famer David Ortiz said Boston Red Sox owner John Henry is concerned about the direction of his last-place team.

news_items.headline: What Should the Astros Do About Bryan Abreu?
news_items.summary: The curious case of Bryan Abreu continues to become more intriguing with every appearance he makes for the Houston Astros. For a pitcher who was once considered one of the most feared setup men in Major League Baseball, it is an understatement to say that Abreu has underperformed this season. A reliever who routinely sat […]
